Effect: Jetpack.name: 效果：喷气背包 Effect: Jetpack
Effect: Jetpack.description:
由 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.equipment.Item.CIZ3Walj6DmiaJGq]{喷气背包（商用）}、@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.equipment.Item.DnuTMCJFBDj9nNRx]{喷气背包（战术型）} 赋予

你获得飞行速度。

Granted by @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.equipment.Item.CIZ3Walj6DmiaJGq]{Jetpack (Commercial)}, @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.equipment.Item.DnuTMCJFBDj9nNRx]{Jetpack (Tactical)}

You gain a fly Speed.

Effect: Raise a Shield.name: 效果：举起盾牌 Raise a Shield
Effect: Raise a Shield.description:
效果来自@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.xjGwis0uaC2305pm]{Raise a Shield}

当你举起盾牌时，你将盾牌所列的环境加值添加到自己的AC上。

Effect: Explorer's Canteen.name: 效果：探索者的水壶 Effect: Explorer's Canteen
Effect: Explorer's Canteen.description:
由 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.equipment.Item.WGdcokSMynEyF332]{探索者水壶} 赋予

你在对抗食物或水中存在的任何毒素或疾病的豁免检定上获得 +1 物品加值。

Granted by @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.equipment.Item.WGdcokSMynEyF332]{Explorer's Canteen}

You gain a +1 item bonus to saves against any poisons or diseases present in food or water.

Effect: Artificial Immortalizer.name: 效果：人工永生化者 Effect: Artificial Immortalizer
Effect: Artificial Immortalizer.description:
由 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.equipment.Item.0J8PMTLDGIIP1KGE]{Artificial Immortalizer} 赋予

你获得 50 点临时生命值。

Granted by @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.equipment.Item.0J8PMTLDGIIP1KGE]{Artificial Immortalizer}

You gain 50 temporary Hit Points.

Effect: Force Field.name: 效果：力场 Effect: Force Field
Effect: Force Field.description:
用于追踪你的力场护盾生命值的效果。

Tracking effect for your force field's HP.

Effect: Bone Serum.name: 效果：骨骼血清 Effect: Bone Serum
Effect: Bone Serum.description:
由 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.equipment.Item.dvvYuzx0QUORXMl1]{骨髓血清} 赋予

你获得虚空治疗。

Granted by @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.equipment.Item.dvvYuzx0QUORXMl1]{Bone Serum}

You gain void healing.

Effect: Sharpshooter Serum (Reduce Cover.name: 效果：神射手血清（降低掩护） Effect: Sharpshooter Serum (Reduce Cover)
Effect: Sharpshooter Serum (Reduce Cover.description:
由 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.equipment.Item.xBlfbu0fUmV6ucqR]{神射手血清}、@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.equipment.Item.vcCeNRokXv5HSlRf]{神射手血清（战术型）} 通过短暂效果赋予

你因掩蔽获得的 AC 状况加值减少。

Granted by @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.equipment.Item.xBlfbu0fUmV6ucqR]{Sharpshooter Serum}, @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.equipment.Item.vcCeNRokXv5HSlRf]{Sharpshooter Serum (Tactical)} via Ephemeral Effect

Your circumstance bonus to AC from cover is reduced.

Effect: Hypopen (Quickened or Fast Heali.name: 效果：希波笔（加速或快速治疗） Effect: Hypopen (Quickened or Fast Healing)
Effect: Hypopen (Quickened or Fast Heali.description:
由 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.equipment.Item.gRZxPwfmz3O0bgOt]{Hypopen（菁英型）} 或 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.equipment.Item.6JzH3VDHqv2rZJer]{Hypopen（终极型）} 赋予

选择以下一项好处。

  • 你获得加速。你可以将这个额外动作用于垫步、疾奔或打击。
  • 你获得快速治疗 10。

Granted by @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.equipment.Item.gRZxPwfmz3O0bgOt]{Hypopen (Elite)} or @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.equipment.Item.6JzH3VDHqv2rZJer]{Hypopen (Ultimate)}

Choose one of the following benefits.

  • You become quickened. You can use the extra action to Step, Stride, or Strike.
  • You gain fast healing 10.

Effect: Sharpshooter Serum.name: 效果：神射手血清 Effect: Sharpshooter Serum
Effect: Sharpshooter Serum.description:
由 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.equipment.Item.xBlfbu0fUmV6ucqR]{神射手血清（商用）}、@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.equipment.Item.vcCeNRokXv5HSlRf]{神射手血清（战术型）} 授予

你的目标因掩蔽而获得、用于对抗你远程打击的 AC 情境加值会降低。

Granted by @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.equipment.Item.xBlfbu0fUmV6ucqR]{Sharpshooter Serum (Commercial)}, @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.equipment.Item.vcCeNRokXv5HSlRf]{Sharpshooter Serum (Tactical)}

The circumstance bonus to AC your targets gain from cover against your ranged Strikes is reduced.

Effect: Medpatch.name: 效果：医用贴片 Effect: Medpatch
Effect: Medpatch.description:
由 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.equipment.Item.B0FiYMxy7iDiHh48]{医疗贴片（商业型）}、@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.equipment.Item.HWHdAQArhRauTpm6]{医疗贴片（战术型）}、@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.equipment.Item.55nSLw1aQ0K0rK2L]{医疗贴片（先进型）}、@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.equipment.Item.6VDHl7xkSp8Sc8yy]{医疗贴片（卓越型）}、@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.equipment.Item.KFjPEG7kw733splu]{医疗贴片（菁英型）}、@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.equipment.Item.dJyYifMFfgbIwT3c]{医疗贴片（终极型）}赋予

你在对抗疾病和毒素的豁免检定中获得物品加值。

Granted by @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.equipment.Item.B0FiYMxy7iDiHh48]{Medpatch (Commercial)}, @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.equipment.Item.HWHdAQArhRauTpm6]{Medpatch (Tactical)}, @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.equipment.Item.55nSLw1aQ0K0rK2L]{Medpatch (Advanced)}, @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.equipment.Item.6VDHl7xkSp8Sc8yy]{Medpatch (Superior)}, @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.equipment.Item.KFjPEG7kw733splu]{Medpatch (Elite)}, @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.equipment.Item.dJyYifMFfgbIwT3c]{Medpatch (Ultimate)}

You gain an item bonus to saving throws against diseases and poisons.

Effect: Celebrity Serum.name: 效果：名流血清 Effect: Celebrity Serum
Effect: Celebrity Serum.description:
由 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.equipment.Item.JgVv4m4sh9faVSDD]{名流血清} 赋予

你在表演检定上获得 +1 物品加值。

Granted by @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.equipment.Item.JgVv4m4sh9faVSDD]{Celebrity Serum}

You gain a +1 item bonus to Performance checks.

Effect: Commando Serum.name: 效果：突击队血清 Effect: Commando Serum
Effect: Commando Serum.description:
由 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.equipment.Item.Yuws1too4LhO7Cu9]{突击队血清} 赋予

你获得 1d10+5 临时生命值，以及对任意速度的 +5-foot 物品加值。

Granted by @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.equipment.Item.Yuws1too4LhO7Cu9]{Commando Serum}

You gain 1d10+5 temporary Hit Points, as well as a +5-foot item bonus to any Speed.

Effect: Aeon Stone (Uplifting).name: 效果：万世石（振奋） Effect: Aeon Stone (Uplifting)
Effect: Aeon Stone (Uplifting).description:
你获得 1 分钟的飞行速度，其数值等于你的速度或 20 尺，以较高者为准。

You gain a fly Speed for 1 minute equal to your Speed or 20 feet, whichever is greater.

Effect: Infiltrator Serum.name: 效果：渗透者血清 Effect: Infiltrator Serum
Effect: Infiltrator Serum.description:
由 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.equipment.Item.u82tssnDgj4f9UCS]{潜入者血清} 赋予

你在“潜行”和“解除装置”的检定中获得 +1 物品加值。

Granted by @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.equipment.Item.u82tssnDgj4f9UCS]{Infiltrator Serum}

You gain a +1 item bonus to checks to Sneak and Disable a Device.
